metadata.title: Nubigest — Business Management Platform
metadata.description: Nubigest centralizes your organization, users, clients, documentation and internal processes in a single cloud-based platform.

hero.title: The operating system for your business
hero.description: Nubigest centralizes your organization, users, clients, documentation and internal processes in a single platform — available anywhere, ready from day one.

about.title: Built for businesses that need clarity
about.description: Nubigest is a cloud-based business management platform designed for teams that need to organize operations, manage access and keep track of day-to-day activity — without complexity. Built as a subscription service, it adapts as your organization grows.

items.label: Cloud-hosted
items.description: No servers to manage. Your data is always available, backed up and secure.

items.label: Subscription-based
items.description: Simple, predictable pricing. No upfront costs, no long-term commitments required.

items.label: Multi-tenant
items.description: Manage one organization or several from a single account.

features.title: Everything your team needs
features.description: Nubigest brings together the core tools businesses need to stay organized, aligned and efficient.

items.title: Organization Management
items.description: Structure your company, departments and roles in a clear, manageable hierarchy.

items.title: User & Access Control
items.description: Define who can access what with granular, role-based permissions.

items.title: Multi-tenant Support
items.description: Operate and oversee multiple organizations from a single account.

items.title: Client Management
items.description: Centralize contact data and keep client records organized and accessible.

items.title: Document Management
items.description: Store, organize and retrieve business documents securely in one place.

items.title: Audit & Activity Logs
items.description: Track changes, actions and events across your organization automatically.

items.title: No IT overhead
items.description: Nubigest runs entirely in the cloud. No infrastructure to provision, maintain or worry about.

items.title: Structured for teams
items.description: Role-based access and permission hierarchies keep teams aligned and data protected.

items.title: Built to scale
items.description: From a small team to a multi-organization operation, the platform grows with your needs.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.description: Sign up and set up your organization with basic settings in just a few minutes.

steps.title: Invite your team
steps.description: Add users, assign roles and configure access levels tailored to each person.

steps.title: Start managing
steps.description: Access all your tools for operations, documentation and team activity from a single dashboard.

items.question: What is Nubigest?
items.answer: Nubigest is a cloud-based SaaS platform for business management. It helps organizations centralize operations, manage users and access, store documentation and track internal activity.

items.question: Is it subscription-based?
items.answer: Yes. Nubigest is offered as a software-as-a-service subscription. You pay a recurring fee for access to the platform without upfront costs.

items.question: Can I manage multiple organizations?
items.answer: Yes. The platform supports multi-tenant architecture, allowing you to operate and manage multiple organizations from a single account.

items.question: How is user access managed?
items.answer: Access is controlled through a role-based permission system. You can define custom roles and assign them to users to control exactly what each person can see and do.

items.question: Where is my data stored?
items.answer: Nubigest is hosted on secure cloud infrastructure. Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest and is never shared with third parties.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: You can create an account directly from the sign-up page. No installation is required — everything runs in your browser.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Create your account and start managing your business from a single platform.
